steps.title: Identify the contribution from each question type
steps.content:
We need to account for how much each type of question contributes to the 78-point total.
  • 1-point questions: If there are $x$ of them, they contribute $x \times 1 = x$ points
  • 2-point questions: If there are $y$ of them, they contribute $y \times 2 = 2y$ points

steps.title: Write the total equation
steps.content:
The sum of all contributions must equal the total assignment value:
$$x + 2y = 78$$
This equation directly represents the situation. That matches choice D — D is correct.
